How to unsubscribe from Blue Apron

Blue Apron has moved away from a traditional subscription model, allowing you to order meals à la carte without a recurring commitment. However, if you have a Blue Apron+ membership or an Autoship & Save plan, you may want to cancel it. Here's how:

CANCEL BLUE APRON SUBSCRIPTION VIA WEBSITE

To cancel your Blue Apron subscription via the website:

  • Sign in to your account on the Blue Apron website.
  • Go to Account → Blue Apron+ (or Autoship & Save).
  • Select "Cancel Membership" or "Cancel Plan".
  • Follow the on-screen prompts to complete the cancellation.
  • Ensure you cancel before the cutoff date for your next order, typically 6 to 7 days before your delivery day.

CANCEL BLUE APRON SUBSCRIPTION VIA MOBILE APP

To cancel your Blue Apron subscription via the mobile app:

  • Sign in to your account on the Blue Apron mobile app.
  • Go to Account → Blue Apron+ (or Autoship & Save).
  • Select "Cancel Membership" or "Cancel Plan".
  • Follow the on-screen prompts to complete the cancellation.
  • Ensure you cancel before the cutoff date for your next order, typically 6 to 7 days before your delivery day.

CANCEL BLUE APRON SUBSCRIPTION VIA EMAIL

To cancel your Blue Apron subscription via email:

  • Send a cancellation request to cancellations@blueapron.com.
  • Ensure you cancel before the cutoff date for your next order, typically 6 to 7 days before your delivery day.
Cancel Subscription

ℹ️ Tip: This is a direct link to the subscription management page. If it doesn't work (some services tend to hide these pages), simply go to the homepage and follow the steps in the guide above.

We constantly monitor the relevance of our guides to ensure you can cancel unwanted subscriptions quickly and easily. If you notice any discrepancy or a service has changed its interface, please click the "?" button. Your feedback helps us keep the information accurate!

Last update: 19.04.2026
